detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DividendDistributor.setShare(address,uint256) (KoriInu.sol#427-455):
	External calls:
	- distributeDividend(shareholder) (KoriInu.sol#431)
		- address(shareholder).transfer(amount) (KoriInu.sol#491)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- addShareholder(shareholder) (KoriInu.sol#439)
		- shareholderIndexes[shareholder] = shareholders.length (KoriInu.sol#539)
	- removeShareholder(shareholder) (KoriInu.sol#443)
		- shareholderIndexes[shareholders[shareholders.length - 1]] = shareholderIndexes[shareholder] (KoriInu.sol#551)
	- addShareholder(shareholder) (KoriInu.sol#439)
		- shareholders.push(shareholder) (KoriInu.sol#541)
	- removeShareholder(shareholder) (KoriInu.sol#443)
		- shareholders[shareholderIndexes[shareholder]] = shareholders[shareholders.length - 1] (KoriInu.sol#549)
		- shareholders.pop() (KoriInu.sol#553)
	- shares[shareholder].amount = amount (KoriInu.sol#451)
	- shares[shareholder].totalExcluded = getCumulativeDividends(shares[shareholder].amount) (KoriInu.sol#453)
	- totalShares = totalShares.sub(shares[shareholder].amount).add(amount) (KoriInu.sol#449)
